title: My First Flight
content: Emma felt excited and nervous before her first flight. She arrived at the airport early with her suitcase and boarding pass. Everything seemed new and unfamiliar. After passing through security, she waited near the gate and watched airplanes take off outside the large windows. When it was finally time to board, Emma found her seat and fastened her seatbelt carefully. As the plane left the ground, her heart beat faster for a moment. Soon, she relaxed and enjoyed the view of clouds below. The experience was much less frightening than she had imagined.
